component.name: indiAccounting
component.summary: Double-entry accounting and payroll for small business

description.p: indiAccounting is a complete double-entry accounting and payroll application for small businesses, with a native desktop interface. It keeps a real general ledger behind the scenes, so your invoices, bills, and payroll all flow into proper financial statements — no spreadsheets, no monthly fees.

ul.li: Invoices and estimates, with customer payments and recurring invoices
Bills, vendor payments, and purchase orders with receiving
Accrual-basis double-entry general ledger and manual journal entries
Payroll with federal and all-50-state withholding, FICA, FUTA, SUTA, and prevailing-wage / certified payroll
Sales tax tracking by jurisdiction, reporting, and filing
Inventory and product/service catalog
Bank statement import and reconciliation
Financial reports: profit and loss, balance sheet, trial balance, cash flow, A/R and A/P aging, and general ledger
1099-NEC vendor reporting and W-2 payroll forms
Budgets with budget-vs-actual
Mileage and time tracking
Late fees, payment reminders, and customer statements
CSV import and export, and PDF invoices and estimates
Receipt capture with optional OCR
Automatic verified local backups

description.p: indiAccounting respects your privacy and works entirely offline. Your company's books are stored in a local file on your own computer and never leave your machine.

ul.li: Double-entry accounting with a full general ledger and financial statements
Invoicing, estimates, bills, purchase orders, and payments
Payroll with federal and all-50-state withholding and prevailing-wage support
Sales tax tracking, reporting, and filing
Bank reconciliation, budgets, inventory, 1099 and W-2 reporting
Automatic verified local backups; fully offline
